title: Library Borrowing Fee Calculator
category: Scanner, Methods, If-Else, Switch, Exception Handling
description: Create a simple Java console-based application that checks borrower type, overdue status, book category, and overdue fee.

easy.summary: Input borrower name, borrower age, and book code. Display borrower category and book category.
requirements: Use clear input prompts, for example Enter Borrower Name:, Enter Borrower Age:, and Enter Book Code:.
Display the required output values clearly after all inputs are processed.
Ask for borrower name, borrower age, and book code.
Determine the borrower category using getBorrowerCategory(int age).
Determine the book category using getBookCategory(String bookCode).
Use if-else for borrower category and switch for book code.

medium.summary: Add days overdue and display overdue status.
requirements: Add an input for number of days overdue.
Display days overdue and overdue status.
Add number of days overdue as a new input.
Determine the overdue status using getOverdueStatus(int daysOverdue).

hard.summary: Calculate overdue fee and display the complete borrowing result.
requirements: Add a labeled output line for overdue fee.
Display the complete borrowing fee result.
Calculate overdue fee using number of days overdue * 10.
Display the complete borrowing fee result.
Handle invalid age and days-overdue values properly.
